drop table if exists booking_driver_offers cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists bookings cascade Hibernate: create table booking_driver_offers (offered_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, version bigint not null, booking_id uuid not null, driver_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, external_offer_id varchar(100) not null, status enum ('ACCEPTED','EXPIRED','PENDING','REJECTED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table bookings (assignment_attempt integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, next_assignment_at timestamp(6) with time zone, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, version bigint not null, driver_id uuid, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, vehicle_type varchar(30) not null, idempotency_key varchar(80), drop_address varchar(255) not null, pickup varchar(255) not null, status enum ('ASSIGNED','CANCELLED','COMPLETED','CREATED') not null, primary key (id)) 2026-04-02T23:20:39.816+05:30 INFO 43091 --- [booking-service] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' Hibernate: insert into bookings (assignment_attempt,created_at,driver_id,drop_address,idempotency_key,next_assignment_at,pickup,status,updated_at,user_id,vehicle_type,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select b1_0.id from bookings b1_0 where b1_0.status=? and (b1_0.next_assignment_at is null or b1_0.next_assignment_at<=?) order by b1_0.created_at Hibernate: select b1_0.id,b1_0.assignment_attempt,b1_0.created_at,b1_0.driver_id,b1_0.drop_address,b1_0.idempotency_key,b1_0.next_assignment_at,b1_0.pickup,b1_0.status,b1_0.updated_at,b1_0.user_id,b1_0.vehicle_type,b1_0.version from bookings b1_0 where b1_0.id=? for update Hibernate: select bdo1_0.id,bdo1_0.booking_id,bdo1_0.driver_id,bdo1_0.external_offer_id,bdo1_0.offered_at,bdo1_0.status,bdo1_0.updated_at,bdo1_0.version from booking_driver_offers bdo1_0 where bdo1_0.booking_id=? order by bdo1_0.offered_at desc fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: assignmentSchedulerReschedulesWhenOfferCallFailsForAllCandidates
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into bookings (assignment_attempt,created_at,driver_id,drop_address,idempotency_key,next_assignment_at,pickup,status,updated_at,user_id,vehicle_type,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) testcase.name: assignmentSchedulerDispatchesPendingOfferToDriverService
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into bookings (assignment_attempt,created_at,driver_id,drop_address,idempotency_key,next_assignment_at,pickup,status,updated_at,user_id,vehicle_type,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select b1_0.id from bookings b1_0 where b1_0.status=? and (b1_0.next_assignment_at is null or b1_0.next_assignment_at<=?) order by b1_0.created_at Hibernate: select b1_0.id,b1_0.assignment_attempt,b1_0.created_at,b1_0.driver_id,b1_0.drop_address,b1_0.idempotency_key,b1_0.next_assignment_at,b1_0.pickup,b1_0.status,b1_0.updated_at,b1_0.user_id,b1_0.vehicle_type,b1_0.version from bookings b1_0 where b1_0.id=? for update Hibernate: select bdo1_0.id,bdo1_0.booking_id,bdo1_0.driver_id,bdo1_0.external_offer_id,bdo1_0.offered_at,bdo1_0.status,bdo1_0.updated_at,bdo1_0.version from booking_driver_offers bdo1_0 where bdo1_0.booking_id=? order by bdo1_0.offered_at desc fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select bdo1_0.id from booking_driver_offers bdo1_0 where bdo1_0.booking_id=? and bdo1_0.driver_id=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into booking_driver_offers (booking_id,driver_id,external_offer_id,offered_at,status,updated_at,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: update bookings set assignment_attempt=?,created_at=?,driver_id=?,drop_address=?,idempotency_key=?,next_assignment_at=?,pickup=?,status=?,updated_at=?,user_id=?,vehicle_type=?,version=? where id=? and version=? Hibernate: select bdo1_0.id,bdo1_0.booking_id,bdo1_0.driver_id,bdo1_0.external_offer_id,bdo1_0.offered_at,bdo1_0.status,bdo1_0.updated_at,bdo1_0.version from booking_driver_offers bdo1_0 where bdo1_0.booking_id=? order by bdo1_0.offered_at desc fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: attemptAssignmentMarksBookingAssignedWhenDriverAccepts
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into bookings (assignment_attempt,created_at,driver_id,drop_address,idempotency_key,next_assignment_at,pickup,status,updated_at,user_id,vehicle_type,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
